info.name: Online Checkers - Identity and Profile Contracts
info.description: Rigorous black-box checks for service readiness, OIDC metadata, auth failure modes, user registration, login, JWT usage, and asynchronous profile projection.

exec: pm.test("service identity", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.status).to.eql("ok"); pm.expect(body.service).to.eql("auth-service"); });
pm.test("service identity", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.status).to.eql("ok"); pm.expect(body.service).to.eql("matchmaking-service"); });
pm.test("service identity", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.status).to.eql("ok"); pm.expect(body.service).to.eql("game-service"); });
pm.test("service identity", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.status).to.eql("ok"); pm.expect(body.service).to.eql("rating-service"); });
pm.test("service identity", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.status).to.eql("ok"); pm.expect(body.service).to.eql("profile-service"); });

pm.test("issuer and algorithms", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.issuer).to.eql(pm.environment.get("authUrl")); pm.expect(body.jwks_uri).to.eql(pm.environment.get("authUrl") + "/.well-known/jwks.json"); pm.expect(body.id_token_signing_alg_values_supported).to.include("RS256"); });

pm.test("usable RSA signing key", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.keys).to.have.lengthOf.at.least(1); const key = body.keys[0]; pm.expect(key.kty).to.eql("RSA"); pm.expect(key.alg).to.eql("RS256"); pm.expect(key.use).to.eql("sig"); pm.expect(key.n).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; pm.expect(key.e).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code unauthorized", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "unauthorized"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_token", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_token"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_request", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_request"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_request", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_request"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_username", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_username"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_password", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_password"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("safe user A", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.user.id).to.match(/^[0-9a-f-]{36}$/); pm.expect(body.user.username).to.eql(pm.environment.get("usernameA")); pm.expect(body.user).not.to.have.property("password_hash"); pm.environment.set("userAId", body.user.id); });

pm.test("safe user B", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.user.id).to.match(/^[0-9a-f-]{36}$/); pm.expect(body.user.username).to.eql(pm.environment.get("usernameB")); pm.expect(body.user).not.to.have.property("password_hash"); pm.environment.set("userBId", body.user.id); });

pm.test("safe user C", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.user.id).to.match(/^[0-9a-f-]{36}$/); pm.expect(body.user.username).to.eql(pm.environment.get("usernameC")); pm.expect(body.user).not.to.have.property("password_hash"); pm.environment.set("userCId", body.user.id); });

pm.test("error code username_taken", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "username_taken"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code email_taken", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "email_taken"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_credentials", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_credentials"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_credentials", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_credentials"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("token pair A", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.token_type).to.eql("Bearer"); pm.expect(body.expires_in).to.be.above(0); pm.expect(body.access_token.split(".")).to.have.lengthOf(3); pm.expect(body.id_token.split(".")).to.have.lengthOf(3); pm.expect(body.user.id).to.eql(pm.environment.get("userAId")); pm.environment.set("tokenA", body.access_token); pm.environment.set("idTokenA", body.id_token); });

pm.test("token pair B", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.token_type).to.eql("Bearer"); pm.expect(body.expires_in).to.be.above(0); pm.expect(body.access_token.split(".")).to.have.lengthOf(3); pm.expect(body.id_token.split(".")).to.have.lengthOf(3); pm.expect(body.user.id).to.eql(pm.environment.get("userBId")); pm.environment.set("tokenB", body.access_token);  });

pm.test("token pair C", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.token_type).to.eql("Bearer"); pm.expect(body.expires_in).to.be.above(0); pm.expect(body.access_token.split(".")).to.have.lengthOf(3); pm.expect(body.id_token.split(".")).to.have.lengthOf(3); pm.expect(body.user.id).to.eql(pm.environment.get("userCId")); pm.environment.set("tokenC", body.access_token);  });

item.name: ID token rejected as access token

exec: pm.test("error code invalid_token", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_token"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("correct subject and safe fields", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.user.id).to.eql(pm.environment.get("userAId")); pm.expect(body.user.username).to.eql(pm.environment.get("usernameA")); pm.expect(body.user).not.to.have.property("password_hash"); });

item.name: Wait for user A profile projection

exec: function poll() { pm.sendRequest(pm.environment.get("profileUrl") + "/api/v1/profiles/" + pm.environment.get("userAId"), (err, res) => { if (!err && res.code === 200) { const body = res.json(); pm.test("profile projection created", () => { pm.expect(body.user_id).to.eql(pm.environment.get("userAId")); pm.expect(body.username).to.eql(pm.environment.get("usernameA")); }); return; } if (Date.now() >= deadline) { pm.test("profile projection created", () => pm.expect.fail(err || "last HTTP status " + (res && res.code))); return; } setTimeout(poll, 250); }); }
if (pm.response.code === 200) { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.test("profile projection created", () => pm.expect(body.user_id).to.eql(pm.environment.get("userAId"))); } else { poll(); }

item.name: Wait for all profiles via batch with duplicate IDs

exec: const deadline = Date.now() + 20000; const url = pm.environment.get("profileUrl") + "/api/v1/profiles/batch"; const body = {user_ids:[pm.environment.get("userAId"),pm.environment.get("userBId"),pm.environment.get("userAId"),pm.environment.get("userCId")]};
function verify(res) { const data = res.json(); pm.expect(data.profiles).to.have.lengthOf(3); pm.expect(new Set(data.profiles.map(p => p.user_id)).size).to.eql(3); }

function poll() { pm.sendRequest({url, method:"POST", header:{"Content-Type":"application/json"}, body:{mode:"raw",raw:JSON.stringify(body)}}, (err,res) => { if (!err && res.code === 200 && res.json().profiles.length === 3) { pm.test("batch is eventually complete and deduplicated", () => verify(res)); return; } if (Date.now() >= deadline) { pm.test("batch is eventually complete and deduplicated", () => pm.expect.fail(err || "profiles missing")); return; } setTimeout(poll,250); }); }
if (pm.response.code === 200 && pm.response.json().profiles.length === 3) { pm.test("batch is eventually complete and deduplicated", () => verify(pm.response)); } else { poll(); }

pm.test("error code invalid_request", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_request"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code profile_not_found", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "profile_not_found"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code too_many_profiles", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "too_many_profiles"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_token", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_token"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_country_code", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_country_code"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_avatar_url", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_avatar_url"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_display_name", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_display_name"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

pm.test("error code invalid_bio", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body).to.have.nested.property("error.code", "invalid_bio"); pm.expect(body.error.message).to.be.a("string").and.not.empty; });

body.raw: {"display_name":"  Alice CI  ","country_code":" us ","avatar_url":" https://example.test/avatar.png ","bio":"  edge-case bio  "}

exec: pm.test("values normalized", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.display_name).to.eql("Alice CI"); pm.expect(body.country_code).to.eql("US"); pm.expect(body.avatar_url).to.eql("https://example.test/avatar.png"); pm.expect(body.bio).to.eql("edge-case bio"); });

pm.test("blank optional fields do not erase persisted values", () => { const body = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(body.display_name).to.eql("Alice CI"); pm.expect(body.bio).to.eql("edge-case bio"); });
